args.body:
## Purpose
Elementor widget controls reference for developers.

## Use this when
- Building a custom widget that needs typography controls
- Integrating Group_Control_Typography

## Settings highlights
- Type constants (TEXT, NUMBER, SELECT, REPEATER)
- Responsive controls accept tablet/mobile siblings

## Limits / gotchas
- Setting names must be lowercase a-z0-9_ only.
args.title: Widget controls reference
